subcodes.first_line: O Thou my beloved daughter! Thine eloquent and fluent letter was perused in a garden, under the cool shade of a tree
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز من نامه فصیح و بلیغ در کمال سرور در باغی در زیر سایه درختی
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @war and peace, @role and station of women, @House of Justice, @predictions and prophecies
